errors_and_solutions.error: R3F eventSource on root div intercepts all page clicks
errors_and_solutions.solution: Scope eventSource to #model-event-source (3D container only)

errors_and_solutions.error: @theme inline in layout-imported CSS doesn't generate Tailwind utilities
errors_and_solutions.solution: Use explicit CSS classes outside @layer, prefixed (zn-blue-50)

errors_and_solutions.error: @layer utilities loses specificity vs unscoped globals.css rules
errors_and_solutions.solution: Scope all template CSS under .zentry-template selector, no @layer

errors_and_solutions.error: Design system fonts override template fonts (Instrument Sans wins over Zentry)
errors_and_solutions.solution: Direct font-family in scoped selectors: .zentry-template .hero-heading { font-family: zentry }

errors_and_solutions.error: Video loader stuck — onLoadedData doesn't fire after SSR hydration
errors_and_solutions.solution: Fallback useEffect checking video.readyState >= 3 on mount

errors_and_solutions.error: Safari blocks indirect .play() via setState→useEffect
errors_and_solutions.solution: IntersectionObserver with .play() directly in callback

errors_and_solutions.error: loadedData.length > 3 gate blocks Safari (onLoadedMetadata doesn't fire for all)
errors_and_solutions.solution: Removed gate, play based on startPlay + isPlaying state only

errors_and_solutions.error: useEffect dependency array size changed between renders
errors_and_solutions.solution: Keep same 4 deps [startPlay, videoId, isPlaying, loadedData] but remove blocking condition

errors_and_solutions.error: gsap.from with opacity:0 leaves elements permanently invisible when Lenis smooth scroll is active
errors_and_solutions.cause: Lenis intercepts native scroll events, ScrollTrigger.from sets initial state but trigger never fires
errors_and_solutions.solution: Use gsap.set() for initial state + ScrollTrigger.create({ once: true, onEnter }) + gsap.to() for animation. Add useEffect with ScrollTrigger.refresh(200ms) timer

errors_and_solutions.error: Gemini CLI cannot read files outside workspace
errors_and_solutions.cause: gemini-clean resolves paths only within allowed workspace dirs
errors_and_solutions.solution: Pass file content inline via shell variable instead of file path

errors_and_solutions.error: CSS Modules suggested by Gemini
errors_and_solutions.cause: Gemini review recommended CSS Modules for scope isolation
errors_and_solutions.solution: Rejected — templates port external CSS with existing class names; CSS Modules would require rewriting all classNames. Scoped selectors more pragmatic for porting

errors_and_solutions.error: @font-face collision potential between templates
errors_and_solutions.cause: Two templates could use same font-family name but different versions
errors_and_solutions.solution: Generator namespaces font-family as {slug}-{fontname} in @font-face declarations

architectural_decisions: CSS Scoping: Zentry pattern wins (scoped .{slug}-template selectors, NO @layer utilities)
Barrel Exports: Dual pattern (internal + prefixed for external consumption)
Assets: Namespace per template under public/templates/{slug}/
Video: Config co-located per template, registry centralizes imports
Font namespacing: {slug}-{fontname} prevents @font-face collisions
Single source of truth: constants.ts holds copy, video-config.ts imports from it

errors_and_solutions.error: Videos too small on mobile — text illegible
errors_and_solutions.cause: DeviceMockup iPhone width was 320px in 1080px canvas (30%)
errors_and_solutions.solution: Scaled to 720px (67%), increased all font sizes to xl/2xl minimum

errors_and_solutions.error: iPhone screenshots forced into horizontal video look terrible
errors_and_solutions.cause: Portrait images in landscape canvas = tiny with empty sides
errors_and_solutions.solution: Rule: NEVER mix formats. Vertical=iPhone only, Horizontal=laptop only. Separate props per format

errors_and_solutions.error: Dark app screenshots invisible in seamless mode
errors_and_solutions.cause: Dark screenshot + dark video bg + edge-fade gradient = nothing visible
errors_and_solutions.solution: Replaced seamless mode with card+glow: rounded corners, subtle luminous border (cyan 15%), shadow

errors_and_solutions.error: Screenshots pixelated after zoom
errors_and_solutions.cause: Captured at 1x resolution (1440x900), zoomed 1.6x = stretched
errors_and_solutions.solution: Retina captures: deviceScaleFactor 2 (desktop 2880x1800) / 3 (iPhone 1170x2532)

errors_and_solutions.error: White flash frames in video
errors_and_solutions.cause: Playwright captured 404 error pages (wrong port — API backend instead of frontend)
errors_and_solutions.solution: Verify frontend port with lsof, check HTML response not JSON, verify PNG > 50KB

errors_and_solutions.error: BrandSplash never dismisses
errors_and_solutions.cause: motion.div with empty animate={} never fires onAnimationComplete
errors_and_solutions.solution: Replace with useEffect + setTimeout(3s). Never use empty motion.div as timer

errors_and_solutions.error: Vercel build skipped (303ms)
errors_and_solutions.cause: auditor-ciudadano project had no buildCommand, served stale output
errors_and_solutions.solution: Added vercel.json: buildCommand 'cd citizen-app && npm install && npm run build', outputDirectory 'citizen-app/dist'

errors_and_solutions.error: Admin-app splash not deployed
errors_and_solutions.cause: admin-app Vercel project not linked to GitHub auto-deploy
errors_and_solutions.solution: Manual deploy: cd admin-app && npx vercel --prod

errors_and_solutions.error: citizen-app-ruddy.vercel.app is stale project
errors_and_solutions.cause: Separate Vercel project with old build
errors_and_solutions.solution: Correct URL is auditor-ciudadano.vercel.app — document in memory and context

errors_and_solutions.error: notebooklm login exits silently without opening browser
errors_and_solutions.cause: Missing playwright extra — installed pip install notebooklm-py without [browser]
errors_and_solutions.solution: pip install 'notebooklm-py[browser]' + playwright install chromium

errors_and_solutions.error: notebooklm login via ! in Claude Code fails (no ENTER prompt)
errors_and_solutions.cause: Interactive input() call requires real terminal, not Claude Code ! prefix
errors_and_solutions.solution: User must run notebooklm login from their own terminal

errors_and_solutions.error: 4 Remotion compositions render without animations

errors_and_solutions.error: graphify hook install fails from worktree with NotADirectoryError
errors_and_solutions.cause: .git is a file (pointer) in worktrees, not a directory
errors_and_solutions.solution: Run from main worktree where .git/ is real directory. Bug reportable upstream.

errors_and_solutions.error: Remotion Composition TS2322 — FC<Props> not assignable to LooseComponentType
errors_and_solutions.cause: Required props in InfographicKenBurnsProps make it incompatible with Record<string,unknown>
errors_and_solutions.solution: Make imageSrc optional with default empty string, guard with early return after hooks

errors_and_solutions.error: ffmpeg frame extraction fails from wrong cwd
errors_and_solutions.cause: Bash tool cwd resets between calls, relative paths break
errors_and_solutions.solution: Use absolute paths consistently for all ffmpeg operations

errors_and_solutions.error: PitchDeck counter text overlaps label
errors_and_solutions.cause: Remotion <Sequence> default layout='absolute-fill' wraps in AbsoluteFill, removing counter from flex column flow
errors_and_solutions.solution: Add layout='none' to Sequence — keeps timing without layout side effects

errors_and_solutions.error: /sc:index-repo NOT semantic search
errors_and_solutions.cause: Skill creates PROJECT_INDEX.md for token reduction, not embeddings
errors_and_solutions.solution: Documented as feedback memory. Semantic search gap remains open — pgvector + bge-micro-v2 if needed

architectural_decisions: Graphify = structural AST graph only (imports, communities Louvain), NOT semantic search
sc:index-repo = token reduction index, NOT semantic search — gap remains open

ffmpeg CRF 28 post-process for video distribution (24MB → 4.3MB accepted)

Remotion Sequence layout='none' pattern for flex-compatible timing wrappers

errors_and_solutions.error: InfographicZoom frames identical 0%-95%
errors_and_solutions.cause: Translation formula had spurious (targetScale/100) factor
errors_and_solutions.solution: targetX = (50 - centerX) * width / 100

errors_and_solutions.error: 3 template videos render white/empty
errors_and_solutions.cause: video-config.ts had screens: [] (no screenshots connected)
errors_and_solutions.solution: Add staticFile() references to actual screenshot PNGs

errors_and_solutions.error: gsap-cocktails hero video not visible
errors_and_solutions.cause: Video as sibling of #hero with absolute inset-0 breaks in Next.js App Router (pin-spacer issue)
errors_and_solutions.solution: Move video inside #hero section, add z-index layering (WIP)

errors_and_solutions.error: Dev server background processes dying
errors_and_solutions.cause: Bash background commands killed on completion
errors_and_solutions.solution: Use nohup + redirect to persist
